text: I am standing in a space alive with intellectual energy and curiosity. The first room radiates the subdued buzz of focused collaboration; glass separates me from the collective, yet I feel their thoughts are not so distant from mine. Walking to the second scene, I am met with ideas in vivid print—a celebration of R+D, the marriage of research and development. Here, the world feels full of potential, and I am a small but significant part of the pursuit of understanding. Within these walls, inquiry and dialogue take physical form. I am simultaneously an observer and an actor, questioning my place in the ongoing story of knowledge.
